title: nicotiana excelsior
intro: Nicotiana excelsior, also known as the tall tobacco, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and expectorant effects, which can help alleviate coughs and relieve respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional herbal medicine to promote health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving stress, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Nicotiana excelsior can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and respiratory well-being.
